Why Us / 02

Built for men, nothing else

01 — FOCUS

Men's only, no exceptions

Every piece we make is designed and fit for men — casuals, kurtas, woolens and night suits, and that's the whole catalogue.

02 — FIT

Fabric that suits Indian weather

Breathable cottons for the everyday and proper woolens for winter — chosen for how India actually feels through the year.

03 — REACH

Ordering made simple

Add to bag, fill in your name, address and pincode, and place the order right here — just like Amazon or Flipkart. We'll reach out to confirm delivery.

Help Flirtoo reach every city

Know someone who needs a wardrobe upgrade? Share the shop link — it takes two taps.

About / 03

About Flirtoo

Flirtoo is a menswear label — nothing more, nothing less. We keep the catalogue tight on purpose: casual tees and shirts, shorts, kurtas, and proper woolens for winter, so every piece gets real attention on fit and fabric.

We're built to sell to men across India, straight from the collection to your door, without the runaround.

FLIRTOO

Menswear only — casuals, kurtas, shorts and woolens, shipped across India.
